title: Netherite To Glass
description: Netherite, but make it ✨ glassy ✨. A complete visual rework that turns the strongest gear in Minecraft into crystal-clear flex.
body:
# **🛠️ Version 1.0 – Initial Release
# Added:
# **
🔷 Custom transparent/glass-style textures for:

1. Netherite Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe

1. Netherite Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots
   
1. Netherite Block & Ancient Debris
   
1. Netherite Ingot, Scrap, and Upgrade Smithing Template

💠 Full armor model retextures (both layer_1 and layer_2)

🧱 Retextured block models to look like pixelated glass

🧪 Compatibility with vanilla Minecraft UI and mechanics

Notes:

All items keep their original functionality — only visuals have changed.

Ideal for players who want a futuristic, high-tech, or cursed aesthetic.

Works seamlessly in both creative builds and survival gameplay
